comment: Deterministic retrieval oracle cases for failure-retrieve.mjs over seed.md. For each case the task signature (query) must surface `expectTop` as the #1 ranked entry; `mustNotMatch` titles must not appear in the returned top results (precision). `expectTop`/`mustNotMatch` are substrings of the entry's `###` title. The retired entry (2026-05-30, superseded) must never surface regardless of query.

cases.name: python mutable default
cases.query: python helper def items=[] mutable default argument shared

cases.name: node ci test dependency
cases.query: npm test jsdom devDependencies node ci clean install

cases.name: cross-platform path separator
cases.query: build path separator windows dist cross-platform path.join

cases.name: go nil map panic
cases.query: go nil map write panic make initialize

cases.name: retired async lesson never surfaces
cases.query: javascript forEach async await race writes sequence
